title: Plan and implement an identity governance strategy
summary: Plan and implement an identity governance strategy

sections.title: Plan and implement an identity governance strategy
sections.summary: Plan and implement an identity governance strategy

lessons.title: Plan and implement entitlement management
lessons.content_md:
When new users or external users join your site, quickly assigning them access to Azure solutions is a must. Explore how to entitle users to access your site and resources.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/plan-implement-entitlement-management/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Plan, implement, and manage access review
lessons.content_md:
Once identity is deployed, proper governance using access reviews is necessary for a secure solution. Explore how to plan for and implement access reviews.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/plan-implement-manage-access-review/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Plan, implement, and manage access review

lessons.title: Plan and implement privileged access
lessons.content_md:
Ensuring that administrative roles are protected and managed to increase your Azure solution security is a must. Explore how to use PIM to protect your data and resources.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/plan-implement-privileged-access/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Monitor and maintain Microsoft Entra ID
lessons.content_md:
Audit and diagnostic logs within Microsoft Entra ID provide a rich view into how users are accessing your Azure solution. Learn to monitor, troubleshoot, and analyze sign-in data.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/monitor-maintain-azure-active-directory/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Monitor and maintain Microsoft Entra ID

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Plan and implement an identity governance strategy
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Plan and implement an identity governance strategy**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
